CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2019 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Yellow Leaf Hammocks LLC, a limited liability company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Daniel S. Frankston, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Vivere, LTD.
No appearance by defendant Yellow Leaf Hammocks LLC, a limited liability company.
Plaintiff's complaint for common counts/open book/collections was filed on May 25, 2018, and personally served on defendant Yellow Leaf Hammocks, LLC's Registered Agent on June 16, 2018.
Default was entered as to defendant Yellow Leaf Hammocks LLC, a limited liability company, on August 9, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 18, 2018..
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 13, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Vivere LTD, and against the Defaulted Defendant Yellow Leaf Hammocks LLC, a limited liability company as follows:

Damages/Principal - $35,678.11.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,144.52.
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $510.00.

Total - $41,532.63.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2018 Continued To Feb-27-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
